summary: Assistant Dashboard Testing Complete - All features verified. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including login, dashboard overview, call reminders, schedule view with availability blocks, navigation, and payments.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Assistant Dashboard fully tested. All 14 features from the test request verified working correctly. The critical fix for Day View availability display is confirmed working - availability blocks now show correctly instead of 'No Availability Set'.

assistant_login.notes: Login with email 'test_assistant_ui@test.com' and password 'testpass123' works correctly

dashboard_overview.notes: Displays therapist name 'Dr. John Smith', today's date in DD/MM/YYYY format (20/01/2026)

call_reminders_section.notes: Shows pending appointments with 'Mark Called' buttons, badge shows '2 pending'

mark_called_functionality.notes: Clicking 'Mark Called' updates status to 'Called' with green styling, 'Undo' button appears

needs_attention_section.notes: Shows 'In Progress - Need Check-out' sessions correctly

inactive_clients_section.notes: Displays correctly - shows 'All clients are active!' when no inactive clients

quick_actions.notes: Add Client, Today's Schedule, Record Payment buttons all navigate correctly

navigation_sidebar.notes: Overview, Clients, Schedule, Payments tabs all work correctly

schedule_month_view.notes: Uses TherapistSchedule component, shows January 2026 calendar with session counts

day_view_availability_display.notes: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: Availability blocks (10:00-17:00) display correctly, NOT showing 'No Availability Set'

day_view_add_availability_hidden.notes: 'Add Availability' button correctly NOT visible for assistants

day_view_block_time_visible.notes: 'Block Time' button IS visible and functional for assistants

day_view_slots_bookable.notes: Available slots are clickable and open 'Schedule Appointment' dialog

payments_view.notes: Payment Tracking page accessible, shows total revenue in INR (₹6,800), payment history visible

clinical_data_restricted.notes: Assistant correctly blocked from session notes, assessments, protocols (403 responses)

subscription_status.notes: Assistant gets linked therapist's subscription status correctly
